reporting_scope: latest quarter financial benchmark for tire manufacturers
currency_rule: Use the reporting currency stated for each company. Do not convert currencies.
unit_rule: Use millions unless the source explicitly reports billions; if the source reports billions, convert to millions and note the conversion.

companies.period_label: string, for example Q2 2026, FY 2026, or H1 2026

facts.metric: one of the requested metric names
facts.source_type: official_api | official_pdf | official_excel | official_ir_page | official_regulatory_portal | readable_aggregator_fallback | unknown
facts.table_label: table or section label or null
facts.evidence_quote: short quote or table row text proving the value; null if unavailable
facts.review_reason: short reason if review_required is true
